content.json:
# MSP Operations Center
Multi-customer operational health, active incidents, and SLA risk review.

content.query:
AppServiceHTTPLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Requests=count(), Errors=countif(ScStatus between (500 .. 599)) by _ResourceId
| extend ErrorRate=round(100.0 * Errors / Requests, 2)
| top 10 by ErrorRate desc
content.title: Top App Service Error Rates

content.query:
Heartbeat
| summarize LastHeartbeat=max(TimeGenerated) by Computer, _ResourceId
| extend Status=iff(LastHeartbeat < ago(10m), 'Missing', 'Healthy')
| summarize Count=count() by Status
content.title: VM Heartbeat Status

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Failed=countif(ResultType != 0), Successful=countif(ResultType == 0) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Identity Sign-in Health
